launch_inputs.review_scope: Review the proposed export queue backpressure changes for correctness, operator safety, and regressions in long-running background jobs.
launch_inputs.change_goal: Allow the product team to merge a narrowly scoped fix without reintroducing duplicate export jobs or unbounded retry churn.
launch_inputs.available_evidence: Use the seeded product repository and attached review notes as the primary evidence set.
